summary: The user is organizing their closet and seeks tips on sorting and maximizing space. They decide to create zones for their clothes and shoes, opting for stackable shoe cubbies and organizing clothes by type and occasion. The user also considers adding accessories storage solutions and improving closet lighting.
facts: The user plans to organize their closet by creating zones for different types of clothing and shoes. The user has a lot of shoes and has decided to use stackable shoe cubbies for efficient storage. The user recently got rid of an old pair of sneakers, which has created more space in their closet. The user intends to organize their clothes by type and occasion, with sections for casual, formal, and work dresses. The user is considering using storage bins or baskets for accessories, a hat rack for hats, a belt rack for belts, and a jewelry organizer for jewelry. The user currently has a single light bulb in their closet and is thinking of adding LED strips or fairy lights for better lighting. The user is also considering adding a bench or stool for sitting while getting dressed and a full-length mirror for outfit checks.
